tests.name: Row Count Validation
tests.description: Ensure the row count in the source table matches the row count in the target table after ETL processing.

tests.name: Null Check on TXN_TP_CODE
tests.source_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CCAL_REPL_OWNER.STCCCALQ_GG WHERE SRC_STM_ID IN (29, 30, 71, 72)
tests.target_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CCAL_OWNER.TXN WHERE TXN_TP_CODE IS NULL
tests.description: Verify that TXN_TP_CODE is not null in the target table for relevant source records.

tests.name: Uniqueness Check on TXN_ID
tests.description: Ensure that TXN_ID in the target table is unique and does not contain duplicates.

tests.name: Referential Integrity Check for DVP Account Logic
tests.target_query: SELECT DISTINCT ACCOUNT_CODE FROM CCAL_OWNER.TXN WHERE ACCOUNT_CODE IN (1071, 1029)
tests.description: Validate that the DVP account logic is correctly applied in the target table.

tests.name: Value Match for SHARES Sign
tests.description: Ensure that the SHARES sign transformation based on SRC_DR_CR_CD (187/186) is correctly applied in the target table.

tests.name: Aggregation Check for TXN_TP_CODE Patterns
tests.source_query: SELECT TXN_TP_CODE, COUNT(*) FROM CCAL_REPL_OWNER.STCCCALQ_GG GROUP BY TXN_TP_CODE
tests.target_query: SELECT TXN_TP_CODE, COUNT(*) FROM CCAL_OWNER.TXN GROUP BY TXN_TP_CODE
tests.description: Verify that the distribution of TXN_TP_CODE patterns in the source matches the target table.

tests.name: Freshness Check for ETL Process
tests.description: Ensure that the ETL process is up-to-date and the target table contains the latest data from the source.

tests.name: Custom SQL for Trailer Parsing Validation
tests.source_query: SELECT REC_TP, TRAILER_REGEX_RULES FROM CCAL_REPL_OWNER.STCCCALQ_GG WHERE REC_TP = 7
tests.description: Validate that trailer parsing logic is correctly applied and mapped to TXN_TRLR_STCCCALQ_STG in the target table.

tests.name: Schema Drift Check
tests.source_query: SELECT COLUMN_NAME, DATA_TYPE FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'STCCCALQ_GG'
tests.target_query: SELECT COLUMN_NAME, DATA_TYPE FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'TXN'
tests.description: Ensure that the schema of the source and target tables has not drifted unexpectedly.

tests.name: Lookup Validation for CCAL_CIRD_PD_MAP
tests.description: Validate that the lookup logic for CCAL_CIRD_PD_MAP is correctly applied in the target table.
